name: SecureFuture Whole Life
benefits: Guaranteed death benefit from day one
Cash value accumulation with tax advantages
Dividends reinvested to grow coverage
Policy loans available at any time
use_case: Build lifelong protection and a growing cash asset for your family.

name: USD Universal Life
benefits: USD-denominated policy — protection against currency fluctuation
Flexible premium payments to suit your cash flow
Adjustable death benefit as your needs change
Cash value grows tax-deferred in USD
use_case: Ideal for professionals and business owners who want USD-denominated life coverage and flexible premium control.

name: TTD Universal Life
benefits: TTD-denominated flexible life insurance
Adjust premiums and coverage as life circumstances change
Accumulates cash value over time
Death benefit paid to beneficiaries free of income tax
use_case: Flexible local-currency life protection for individuals and families across Trinidad & Tobago.

name: Guaranteed Protector
benefits: Guaranteed acceptance — no medical exam required
Fixed premiums that never increase
Immediate full coverage from policy issue
Peace of mind for the whole family
use_case: Straightforward, guaranteed protection for those who want reliable coverage without medical underwriting.

name: Ordinary Life - Participating
benefits: Traditional whole life with lifelong coverage
Eligible for annual policy dividends
Dividends can reduce premiums or increase coverage
Guaranteed cash surrender value
use_case: Classic whole life protection that rewards long-term policyholders with dividends and growing cash value.

name: Ordinary Life - Non Participating
benefits: Straightforward whole life coverage
Fixed premiums guaranteed for life
Guaranteed death benefit for named beneficiaries
No fluctuation — predictable cost every year
use_case: Simple, predictable whole life insurance with fixed costs and guaranteed lifetime coverage.

name: Convertible Term To Age 80
benefits: Term coverage convertible to permanent insurance up to age 80
No new medical exam required on conversion
Lower cost entry point into life coverage
Lock in insurability while young and healthy
use_case: Affordable term protection with the security of converting to permanent coverage — no questions asked.

name: Convertible Term To Age 65
benefits: Term coverage with conversion option up to age 65
Convert to whole life without evidence of insurability
Competitive term premiums
Ideal for young families building financial security
use_case: Cost-effective protection for growing families with the flexibility to upgrade to permanent coverage.

name: 20 Year Convertible Term
benefits: Fixed 20-year term with guaranteed convertibility
Convert to permanent policy at any point during term
Level premiums for full 20 years
High death benefit for low monthly cost
use_case: Maximum coverage during your peak earning and family-building years, with conversion flexibility built in.

name: Endowment To Age 65 - Participating
benefits: Policy pays out in full at age 65 or on death — whichever comes first
Eligible for annual dividends to grow the fund
Acts as forced savings and life cover in one
Lump sum payout supports retirement planning
use_case: A dual-purpose plan that builds a retirement nest egg while keeping your family protected.

name: Endowment At Age 65 - Non Participating
benefits: Guaranteed lump sum payout at age 65
Fixed premiums — no dividend variability
Full death benefit if policyholder passes before 65
Predictable planning for retirement
use_case: Guaranteed retirement savings plan with fixed costs and a defined payout target.

name: 20 Year Endowment
benefits: Matures in 20 years with full face value payout
Death benefit paid in full if policyholder passes during term
Encourages disciplined long-term saving
Can be used for education, property, or business goals
use_case: A 20-year savings and protection plan — perfect for a specific financial goal like a child's education or property purchase.

name: Life Paid Up At 65 - Participating
benefits: Premiums stop at age 65 — coverage continues for life
Dividend participation grows policy value
Cash value available via policy loans
No premiums in retirement — coverage remains active
use_case: Pay off your policy before retirement and enjoy lifelong coverage with zero premiums in your senior years.

name: Life Paid Up At 65 - Non Participating
benefits: Fully paid up at age 65 — no further premiums
Guaranteed death benefit continues for life
Fixed premium schedule — no surprises
Simple, clean coverage with a defined end date for payments
use_case: Pay a fixed amount until 65, then enjoy lifelong coverage completely free of charge.

name: 30 Payment Life - Participating
benefits: Fully paid up after 30 premium payments
Dividend eligible — grows policy value over time
Lifelong death benefit after premiums end
Policy loans available against accumulated cash value
use_case: Commit to 30 years of premiums and enjoy lifetime protection — with dividend participation along the way.

name: 30 Payment Life - Non Participating
benefits: Fixed 30-year payment schedule
Guaranteed lifelong death benefit after final payment
No dividend variability — fully predictable
Ideal for budgeting long-term financial commitments
use_case: A structured whole life plan — pay for 30 years, covered for life, with no premium surprises.

name: Education Security Plan - Participating
benefits: Funds your child's university education — guaranteed
Dividend participation can accelerate fund growth
Death benefit protects the education fund if parent passes
Structured payouts aligned to enrollment years
use_case: Guarantee your child's education regardless of what happens — a gift that opens every door.

name: Modified Anticipated 20 Year Endowment - Participating
benefits: Anticipated dividends paid out during the policy term
Full face value at 20-year maturity
Death benefit active throughout the term
Dividend income provides periodic cash flow
use_case: An endowment plan that pays dividends along the way — not just at maturity — giving you income and protection together.

name: Endowment At Age 60 - Non Participating
benefits: Guaranteed payout at age 60
Fixed premiums with no dividend variability
Full death benefit if policyholder passes before 60
Structured early retirement savings vehicle
use_case: Plan for early retirement at 60 with a guaranteed lump sum and fixed-cost protection.

name: Endowment At Age 60 - Participating
benefits: Matures with guaranteed payout at age 60
Dividend participation boosts the final payout
Life coverage active throughout the savings period
Combines protection and early retirement planning
use_case: Save toward retirement at 60 with dividends enhancing your payout — protection built in throughout.

name: RetireWell Fixed Annuity
benefits: Guaranteed monthly income in retirement
Flexible payout periods (10, 20, lifetime)
Inflation rider available
Beneficiary death benefit
use_case: Secure predictable retirement income you cannot outlive.

name: Single Payment Annuity
benefits: One lump sum converts to guaranteed income stream
Immediate income payments from day one
Choose monthly, quarterly, or annual payouts
Beneficiary protection on remaining balance
use_case: Turn a lump sum — from a bonus, inheritance, or retirement gratuity — into a guaranteed income for life.

name: Flexible Premium Annuity
benefits: Contribute any amount, any time — no rigid schedule
Tax-deferred growth during accumulation phase
Convert to income stream at retirement
Partial withdrawals permitted after lock-in period
use_case: Build your retirement fund at your own pace — contribute when you can, grow tax-deferred, withdraw when you're ready.

name: MedShield Comprehensive
benefits: In-patient and out-patient coverage
Specialist consultations included
Prescription drug benefit
Emergency medical evacuation
use_case: Protect against the rising cost of healthcare for you and your family.

name: HomeGuard Property & Savings
benefits: Property damage and loss coverage
Personal accident benefit
Savings component with guaranteed returns
Hurricane and flood rider available
use_case: Protect your home and assets while building emergency savings.

name: Income Shield
benefits: Monthly income replacement if you cannot work due to accident or illness
Covers up to 75% of your pre-disability income
Benefit payments from day one of disability
Own-occupation definition — protects your specific profession
use_case: Your income is your most valuable asset — Income Shield keeps money coming in if injury or illness stops you from working.

name: Cancer Care
benefits: Lump sum payout on first cancer diagnosis
Covers all major cancer types
No restrictions on how payout is used
Coverage continues after first claim for recurrence
use_case: A cancer diagnosis changes everything — Cancer Care gives you a financial buffer so you can focus on recovery, not bills.

name: Critical Illness
benefits: Lump sum on diagnosis of heart attack, stroke, cancer, or kidney failure
Covers 10+ major critical illnesses
Payout is tax-free and unrestricted
Can be added as a rider or standalone policy
use_case: When a critical illness strikes, this plan puts a lump sum in your hands — covering treatment costs, lost income, and recovery.
